The call for proposals to our new Special Feature is now live!

If you’d like to further the following through a One Health perspective then get involved below...

posts.author_name: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
posts.text:
Opinion piece: #Environmental challenges are bigger and more complex than ever. To address them, we need comprehensive #ethics training that balances immediate needs with long-term #sustainability. In PNAS Front Matter: https://ow.ly/eOUu50Zo5gP

#ecosystems  #ClimateChange

This fall, European Incoherent Scatter AB, an international organization headquartered in Sweden, plans to unveil EISCAT_3D, a $65 million next-generation radar system that will allow researchers to probe the upper atmosphere as never before. https://scim.ag/44xgAhC
posts.external_title: Scandinavian radar array will probe mysteries of the northern lights
posts.external_description: EISCAT_3D will paint a new picture of the upper atmosphere as it is roiled by solar outbursts
